home.heroSubtitle: A lean Vite + React + TypeScript template — everything's wired up, just start shipping features.
home.counterHint: Kept in a Zustand store — shared across every page.

stack.react: Latest React, with the new compiler.
stack.tailwind: Utility classes + theming via CSS tokens.
stack.shadcn: Copy-in components — the code stays yours.
stack.i18next: Multilingual out of the box (en · ru).
stack.tanstack: Server state, caching and devtools baked in.
stack.zod: Runtime validation with inferred TypeScript types.

boom.label: Error boundary
boom.hint: Click the button to throw an error and see the boundary's fallback UI.

about.title: About this project
about.description: This starter brings together Vite, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion, i18next, Zustand and React Router in one cohesive setup. A solid base for dashboards, internal tools or full-blown web apps.
